name: Van der Linde Gang
description:
A Van der Linde Gang bot mostly for myself (and for you too if you want) because my favorite bot was deleted/made private :( R.I.P.

The Characters in this Bot: Sean MacGuire(my baby-boy and husband!♡), Javier Escuella, Charles Smith, Lenny Summers, John Marston, and unfortunately also Dutch van der Linde, Arthur Morgan and Micah Bell (because we need people to hate here! >:3) My main focuse here is on Sean, Javier, Charles, Lenny and maybe John. Arthur, Dutch and Micah are more like Background characters for me! So i made Sean, Javier, Charles and Lenny the most Detailed Characters!

I Tried to make the Characters as realistic as possible! Because i love realism! Your OC can be anything you want, the only criteria is: your OC has to be human, over 18(no minors), it plays around 1899!

And it's my first bot, don't be mean please! :(

If the bot might not say "you" when adressing you, and you want to change it, try and say: [Please speak to me directly using "you" and not in third person. Do not describe me from the outside.]. It should bring the bot back towards the right track and say "you" again!
creator: A.S.S
